drl:
rule "R0"
salience 3
no-loop
when
    (or T1(f1 in (0.5), f0 <= 1.5) T1(f1 in (0.5), f0 <= 1.5))
then
    insert(new T2(true, "beta", false));
    insertLogical(new T2(true, "b", true));
end
rule "R1"
salience($b1_0_1)
when
    T1(f1 in (3.0, 5.0), f0 < 5, $b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f0)
then
    insertLogical(new T2(false, "alpha", false));
    insert(new T2(false, "b", false));
end
rule "R2"
when
    $p2_0 : T2($b2_0_0 : f1, $b2_0_1 : f0)
then
    delete($p2_0);
end
rule "R3"
when
    T1()
then
    insert(new T2(false, "ab", true));
    insertLogical(new T2(true, "zz", false));
end
rule "R4"
when
    $p4_0 : T1(f0 != -2, f0 < 2.0 || f1 < 4.0, $b4_0_0 : f0)
    $p4_1 : T0(f0 not in (1.0, -3.0), f1 == false)
    not T2(f1 > "")
then
    insertLogical(new T2($p4_1.isF1(), "b", $p4_1.isF1()));
    $p4_1.setF1(true);
    $p4_1.setF0($p4_0.getF1());
    update($p4_1);
end
rule "R5"
when
    T1()
then
    insertLogical(new T2(false, "a", true));
    insertLogical(new T2(true, "alpha", true));
end
